name: ajudd-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins for Aaron Judd

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Deep-discover a codebase and generate/maintain a full set of Confluence documentation pages (Project Overview, Architecture, Runbook, API Reference, Known Issues, Test Coverage)

plugins.name: release
plugins.description: Plan and execute production releases at Young Living. Creates and manages CAB cards in Jira, handles all required fields, ADF formatting, story linking, and full deploy execution.

plugins.name: story
plugins.description: Create and manage BPT2 stories. Handles required fields, markdown-to-ADF quirks, assignment, lifecycle rules, and status transitions.

plugins.name: comms
plugins.description: Microsoft 365 communications — Teams messaging, email triage, and inbox sweep via the yl-msoffice MCP.

plugins.name: setup
plugins.description: Morning setup — AWS login, Jira briefing, Confluence activity, calendar. Dashboard to start the day.

plugins.name: e2e
plugins.description: Launch and manage the persistent Playwright test browser for VO end-to-end tasks. Handles SSO auth, session startup, and CDP connection.

plugins.name: session
plugins.description: Session lifecycle commands — start a session with intent, checkpoint mid-session to save state, and finish at end of day.
